name: Meatcakes with Dried Fruits
recipeIngredient: 1 pinch Saffron mixed into 1 tablespoon Water
recipeInstructions:
1. For the dough: Mix flour, salt, and cut butter with fingertips until crumbly. Add egg to center, then water; mix until a dough forms. Knead briefly, wrap in plastic, and refrigerate for 1 hour before rolling out.
2. For the filling: Simmer pork in water for 1 1/2 hours until tender. Cube and strain broth. Mix sage with remaining water, add parsley, and return meat to pot. Bring to boil. Add dates, raisins, pistachios, sugar, salt, egg yolks, cream, and saffron mixture; mix.
3. Roll dough into circles and line two cake pans with parchment paper filled with dry beans. Bake at 190°C for 10 minutes until firm but pale.
4. Fill pans with meat mixture and bake another 40 minutes. Let rest 5 minutes before serving.
